message:
fix(storage): explicitly close all FrankenStorage connections instead of relying on Drop

FrankenSQLite's Drop impl logs a diagnostic (drop_close) when connections are
not explicitly closed, which signals resource leaks in production. This commit
ensures every FrankenStorage handle is closed through its .close() method
rather than being silently dropped.

Indexer (src/indexer/mod.rs):
- Wrap watch-mode storage in Arc<Mutex<>> so the watch callback and the
  post-watch cleanup can share ownership safely
- After watch_sources returns, unwrap the Arc, extract from Mutex, and call
  .close() explicitly via new release_watch_storage_after_index() helper
- Handle Mutex poisoning gracefully with close_best_effort_in_place()
- In begin-concurrent persist workers, wrap the chunk processing in a closure
  so franken.close() runs regardless of success/failure, with proper error
  propagation for both the operation and the close
- Add close_storage_after_index() helper for the non-watch path
- Update test to call storage.into_inner().unwrap().close().unwrap()

Library (src/lib.rs):
- Add with_frankensqlite_connection() helper that opens a connection, runs an
  operation, and guarantees close_in_place() is called afterward with
  close_best_effort_in_place() as fallback
- Refactor run_index_with_data to use this helper for idempotency cache reads,
  stats collection, and idempotency result storage — replacing bare
  Connection::open() calls that relied on Drop

Storage (src/storage/sqlite.rs):
- Add Drop impl for FrankenConnectionManager that closes all reader connections
  via close_best_effort_in_place()
- Add close_best_effort_in_place() call in WriterGuard Drop after rollback
- Replace drop(storage) with storage.close() in FrankenStorage::open() before
  FTS bootstrap (explicit close of freshly migrated DB)
- Add pub close_best_effort_in_place() method to FrankenStorage
- Update test to use explicit .close() instead of drop()

Tests (tests/logging.rs):
- Add run_index_does_not_drop_storage_without_explicit_close test that
  verifies no drop_close diagnostic appears after a full index run
- Add EnvVarGuard helper for safe env var manipulation in tests
- Add serial_test dependency for env-mutating tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
